SEARCH
Package pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base

Class NetComponent

java.lang.Object
pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base.ObjectComponent
pl.AWTGameEngine.components.base.NetComponent
Direct Known Subclasses:
Base3DShape, BlankRenderer, Client, Movement2D, NetServer, PlayerSpawner, Prefab, RelayClient, Server, SpriteRenderer, TextRenderer
public abstract class NetComponent extends ObjectComponent
NetComponent is a class which inherits from ObjectComponent and contains events which are common for components which works in the network (e.g. onClientConnect, onSynchronize, onNetUpdate).

Available events:
  • onClientConnect(Server, ConnectedClient)
  • onClientDisconnect(Server, ConnectedClient)
  • onClientTryToConnect(Socket)
  • onSynchronize()
  • onSynchronizeReceived(String)
  • onNetUpdate()
  • canSynchronize()
  • clearNetCache()

  • Method Details

    • onClientConnect

      public void onClientConnect(Server server, ConnectedClient client)

    • onClientDisconnect

      public void onClientDisconnect(Server server, ConnectedClient client)

    • onClientTryToConnect

      public String onClientTryToConnect(Socket socket)
      Event is fired when client tries to connect and after max client check is fired. You can check authentication, blacklist or whitelist here. Return null to let the client in, or return a string, to send a message to the client.
      Parameters:
      socket - Client socket
      Returns:
      null or join-disconnect message

    • onSynchronize

      public NetBlock onSynchronize()
      Object synchronization is handled over a TCP connection to ensure that component will be updated. onSynchronize event is executed only on server side.
      Returns:
      NetBlock

    • onSynchronizeReceived

      public void onSynchronizeReceived(String data)

    • onNetUpdate

      public void onNetUpdate()

    • canSynchronize

      public boolean canSynchronize()
